entries.text:
Verse 3

receive you unto myself

This promise of a second advent of Christ is to be distinguished from His return in glory to the earth; it is the first intimation in Scripture of "the day of Christ". (See Scofield "1 Corinthians 1:8"). Here He comes for His saints 1 Thessalonians 4:14-17 there Matthew 24:29; Matthew 24:30. He come to judge the nations, etc.

Verse 16

Comforter

G. Parakletos, "one called alongside to help." Translated "advocate," 1 John 2:1. Christ is the believer's Paraclete with the Father when he sins; the Holy Spirit the believer's indwelling Paraclete to help his ignorance and infirmity and to make intercession Romans 8:26; Romans 8:27.

(See "Holy Spirit," N.T. doctrine,) Matthew 1:18. (See Scofield "Acts 2:4").

And I will (See Scofield "Luke 11:13").

Verse 17

world

kosmos = world-system. John 15:18; John 15:19; John 7:7. (See Scofield "Revelation 13:8").

Verse 19

world

kosmos = world-system. John 15:18; John 15:19; John 7:7. (See Scofield "Revelation 13:8").

Verse 22

world

kosmos = world-system. John 15:18; John 15:19; John 7:7. (See Scofield "Revelation 13:8").

Verse 27

Peace Cf. (See Scofield "Matthew 10:34").

world kosmos = world-system. John 15:18; John 15:19; John 7:7. (See Scofield "Revelation 13:8").

Verse 31

world

kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").
